analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.moralis.com covered 907 pages with 100% crawl coverage across a multi-project topology. No broken links were detected (0 docs-facing, 0 repository links), though 5 URLs could not be verified due to access restrictions. API reference coverage stands at 30.59% across 847 detected API pages. Example code reliability shows 0% detection, indicating a likely technical limitation with JavaScript-rendered content. Only 2.98% of pages display freshness metadata.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100%) with 907 of 919 requested pages successfully indexed
Zero confirmed broken links across documentation and repository navigation
High crawl confidence (95%) and API detection confidence (85%) indicate reliable structural analysis
847 API pages successfully detected across multi-project documentation structure
Trap URL detection prevented 112 non-documentation URLs from skewing results
risks: SEO/geo issue rate of 21.8% may impact discoverability and international user access
API reference coverage at 30.59% leaves majority of API endpoints without usage documentation
Example code reliability at 0% suggests users cannot verify working code samples (likely JS-rendering detection gap)
Freshness metadata visible on only 2.98% of pages obscures content currency for 97% of documentation
5 unverified links create uncertainty in link health assessment despite zero confirmed breaks
Overall confidence at 63.5% indicates moderate reliability limitations in audit completeness
Link verification confidence at 25% suggests significant blind spots in external dependency health

prioritized_actions.action: Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages to address 97% freshness visibility gap
Expand API usage documentation to cover remaining 69% of 847 detected API pages
Audit and resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 21.8% of pages to improve discoverability
Investigate and resolve 5 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limit/server restrictions
Validate example code rendering approach to confirm 0% detection is tooling limitation not content gap

limitations: Example code reliability at 0% likely reflects detection failure on JavaScript-rendered code blocks rather than absence of examples
5 unverified links could not be validated due to authentication, rate limiting, or server access restrictions beyond audit scope
External audit cannot verify accuracy, correctness, or completeness of technical content within detected documentation pages
Link verification confidence of 25% indicates significant portions of external dependencies remain unvalidated
